# Monitor rolling restart progress
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  READY=$(kubectl get statefulset elasticsearch -n elasticsearch -o jsonpath='{.status.readyReplicas}' 2>/dev/null)
  UPDATED=$(kubectl get statefulset elasticsearch -n elasticsearch -o jsonpath='{.status.updatedReplicas}' 2>/dev/null)
  TOTAL=$(kubectl get statefulset elasticsearch -n elasticsearch -o jsonpath='{.status.replicas}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "[${i}] ready=${READY}/${TOTAL} updated=${UPDATED}"
  if [ "$READY" = "3" ] && [ "$UPDATED" = "3" ]; then
    echo "Rolling restart complete!"
    break
  fi
  sleep 10
done
